title: DoorDash, MongoDB To Join Nasdaq 100; Enphase, Zoom Video Among 6 Stocks Leaving
text: The Nasdaq 100 will add DoorDash, MongoDB and four other stocks on Dec. 18. Enphase Energy, Zoom Video are among six stocks exiting.

title: CDW (CDW) Up 2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: CDW (CDW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: 5 Stocks in Focus on Their Recent Dividend Hike
text: Five stocks to watch with recent dividend hikes are: DDS, CDW, TAC, TTE, CHDN.
